第二件女裝黎?

Everton today announced that the Umbro Everton home shirt for the 2017-18 season will include a new motif celebrating the career of Dixie Dean, thanks to a fan-led initiative. Dean is the club's greatest goalscorer, who netted a record 60 league goals in one season. A silhouette of Dixie Dean will features on the back of the new Everton home shirt collars in all competitions.
